ProductDescription.Description:
WinPrint makes source code and text files beautiful on paper.
A modern take on the classic source-code printing app, WinPrint gives you:
- Syntax highlighting for hundreds of languages, using bundled TextMate grammars - Line numbering - Headers and footers with rich macros — file name, dates, page numbers, language, and more - "N-up" printing: multiple pages on a single sheet to save paper - Full control over margins, fonts, orientation, and paper size - An accurate print preview, so you see exactly what you'll get - Sheet Definitions to save settings for frequent print jobs
Print source code, HTML, Markdown, logs, reports, and any text file — exactly the way you want it.
ProductDescription.ReleaseNotes: First Microsoft Store release of WinPrint. Source and text printing with syntax highlighting, line numbers, headers/footers, n-up layouts, and an accurate preview.

ScreenshotCaptions.Caption: Accurate print preview with syntax highlighting and line numbers
Save paper with multiple-pages-up (n-up) layouts

AppFeatures.AppFeature: Syntax highlighting for hundreds of languages
Line numbers, headers and footers with macros
